issues.sample: MY VEHICLE WHETHER STATIONARY OR IN MOTION ROUTINELY DOES NOT  CHIME FOR A PASSANGER OR DRIVER WITHOUT A SEATBELT. THE LIGHT DOES COME ON BUT IT WILL ONLY CHIME 10% OF THE TIME. I AM NOT HAVING ISSUES WITH IT CHIMING WHEN THERE IS NOT A PERSON IS IN THE SEAT. I AM CONCERNED THIS

narrative.headline: What 2017 Chevrolet Traverse owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 358 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (73% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
